final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing logo for a tech and lifestyle content creator focusing on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: clean flat vector logo, minimalist modern design, universal geometric language avoiding cultural symbols
Subject: abstract mark suggesting energy/technology and lifestyle balance, simple geometric shapes with balanced negative space
Composition: centered mark with generous padding, scalable for circular and square crop formats
Color palette: neutral base (deep navy or charcoal) with one accent color (electric blue or teal), adaptable to monochrome
Constraints: must work as 100x100 avatar on all platforms; monochrome version must remain legible; no text to avoid translation issues; avoid culturally sensitive symbols, religious imagery, hand gestures, animal motifs, or region-specific colors
Avoid: national flags, religious symbols, hand gestures, culturally specific colors (red/white combinations, sacred geometry), complex illustrations, gradients, photorealistic elements, text in any language
